content:
Item 9A: Controls and Procedures
Conclusions regarding disclosure controls and procedures
Our principal executive and principal financial officers, after evaluating the effectiveness of our disclosure controls and procedures (as defined in Exchange Act Rules 13a-15(e) and 15d-15(e)) as of the end of the period covered by this report, have concluded that, based on the evaluation of these controls and procedures required by paragraph (b) of Exchange Act Rules 13a-15 or 15d-15, such disclosure controls and procedures were effective.
Management’s [DATE_TIME] report on internal control over financial reporting
Refer to Management’s Report on Internal Control Over Financial Reporting on page 69.
Attestation report of the registered public accounting firm
Refer to Report of Independent Registered Public Accounting Firm on page 70.
Changes in internal control over financial reporting
There were no changes in internal control over financial reporting identified in connection with the evaluation required by paragraph (d) of Exchange Act Rules 13a-15 or 15d-15 that occurred during [DATE_TIME] that have materially affected, or are reasonably likely to materially affect, our internal control over financial reporting.
Part III
Item 10:
